title: RENT ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: WARM SPRINGS OFFICE RENT ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides short-term rent assistance with eviction prevention or move-in costs, including rent deposit. Medium-term Rental Subsidies include a deposit, rental assistance, and case management and supportive services. 1144 Warm Springs Street Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: All services: Must meet 80% of the Area Median Income Short-term: Proof of need (significant income loss, behind on rent, eviction notice, etc.) Medium-term: Experiencing literal homelessness or at risk of homelessness. Income eligibility varies. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 553-0497 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 553-0497 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for information. Medium-term rental subsidies referrals are provided through Coordinated Entry. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Confederated Tribes of Warm Springs Services: Rent Payment Assistance Rental Deposit Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMESOURCE HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - LENDING MONEY MANAGEMENT - REPRESENTATIVE PAYEE PROGRAM UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WARM SPRINGS OFFICE
